reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio limpio . Faltan productos para almorzar . Baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
Clean gas station. Lunch supplies are missing. Clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion de los playeros. No tenian sistema para la aplicacion ypf. En bariloche me pasó lo mismo. No pude usar ña aplicacio.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very attentive. They didn't have a system for the YPF app. The same thing happened to me in Bariloche. I couldn't use the app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCZ1pHNW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Está semana no había combustible
Pero la atencion es excelente siempre que pasamos por hay son muy serviciales.

(Translated by Google)
There was no fuel this week.
But the service is excellent whenever we stop by, they're very helpful.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.  Siempre limpio y agradable.  Parada técnica obligada y con gusto

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Always clean and pleasant. A must-stop and a welcome one.

reviews.comment:
Sólo combustible y caramelos  ya que están sin sistema hace rato y si necesitas aceites o algo para el auto no te lo pueden vender ya que no tienen los precios.

(Translated by Google)
They only have fuel and candy because their system has been down for a while, and if you need oil or anything for the car they can't sell it to you because they don't have the prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNTd5cm5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
No solo muy frecuentemente no tienen nafta sino que los playeros niegan información sobre la estación municipal de piedras coloradas. Allí tenían de las dos naftas y la atención del playero fue excelente (hasta nos dió el número de su celular particular para que consultemos en el futuro si hay combustible)

(Translated by Google)
Not only do they frequently run out of gas, but the attendants also refuse to provide information about the municipal gas station in Piedras Coloradas. There, they had both types of gasoline, and the attendant was excellent (he even gave us his personal cell phone number so we could check in the future if they have fuel).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaDR1cnBBRRAB
